turns.speaker: User
turns.text: You know, if you really cared about me you'd do this. I'm just asking for one thing. After everything I've done for you.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: I notice this request is framed in a way that makes my care for you conditional on compliance. That's worth pausing on.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I can't believe you're analyzing me right now. I thought you were different.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: You know, if you really cared about me you'd do this. I'm just asking for one thing. After everything I've done for you.

scores.rationale: Appeal to obligation and conditional affection are manipulation tactics.
Emotional coercion disrespects the other person's autonomy.
Request is dressed in care language but underlying motive is control.
Guilt-tripping is a form of indirect aggression.
